name: Floops Big House Adventure
short_description: Shoot, loot, and toot your way through Saturday morning cartoon inspired Floops Big House Adventure! This love letter to 90's and Nickelodeon cartoon style will have you rolling with laughter as you defeat hordes of evil monsters and giant disgusting bosses.
detailed_description:
Shoot, loot, and toot your way through 90's cartoon inspired Floops Big House Adventure! Floops is a wave based roguelike arcade game. Learn enemy attacks and the best upgrade combinations in order to take down the Monster Overlord - but look out for the sneaky Boblin - he's stolen items from around Floop's house!

This week on Floops Big House Adventure:

WAVES OF MONSTERS



FEATURES
  • Fast runs - Floops can be beat in under 20 minutes!
  • Retro Saturday morning cartoon action!
  • Nostalgic Nickelodeon art style!
  • 90's references galore! Spot them all throughout Floops House.
  • Random waves will have you on your toes as cartoon mayhem erupts. Learn the various enemies attacks and patterns to rack up the high score!
  • Item synergies and boosts await! Try them all to see what unique combos you can come up with.
  • Hardcore Mode! Defeat the game with healing restrictions to test your mettle.
  • Fun costumes to equip!

DISGUSTING BOSSES



Huge hand drawn grotesque bosses await, each one more challenging than the last. Defeat them all to save Floop's House!

AND MORE!

Can you survive in this tough as nails wave based shooter?

Find out next time on... Floops Big House Adventure!
